reviews.comment:
A quien corresponda, quiero destacar la atención de Smith!! en la playa , la verdad que vendedores como el son pocos, siempre es muy atento, al comenzar y al finalizar mí carga. La verdad que da muchas ganas de ir seguido. También me oriento como hacerme socia de ACA. Muchas gracias Smith!!

(Translated by Google)
To whom it may concern, I want to highlight Smith's excellent service on the beach! Honestly, there are few vendors like him; he's always very attentive, both at the beginning and end of my trip. It really makes me want to go back often. He also helped me figure out how to become an ACA member. Thank you so much, Smith!

reviews.comment:

Excellent service. Most of the time I fill up with gas, a guy named David helps me. He's always friendly and helpful, very attentive to the car windows, and above all, kind. The restrooms I've used have been in excellent condition. Very good service; it's a pleasure to come back.
